# Recommended Labels for Batonel

## English

Suggested initial labels:

- `bug` — defects or broken behavior
- `enhancement` — feature or improvement request
- `design` — architecture, contract, or rule design topics
- `docs` — documentation work
- `good first issue` — suitable for first-time contributors
- `discussion` — requires open discussion before implementation
- `blocked` — waiting on another issue or decision

## 日本語

初期ラベル案:

- `bug` — 不具合や壊れた挙動
- `enhancement` — 機能追加や改善
- `design` — アーキテクチャ、contract、ルール設計
- `docs` — ドキュメント作業
- `good first issue` — 初回貢献向け
- `discussion` — 実装前に議論が必要
- `blocked` — 他 issue や判断待ち
